title: A Comprehensive Study of WIMP Models Explaining the Fermi-LAT Galactic Center Excess

models.name: U(1) B-L Z' portal
models.label: BminusL
models.ufo_model: U1B-L (Plan C: not vendored in v1)

computational_tools.direct_detection: standard sigma_SI/SD formulas (valence quark counting for vector Z')
computational_tools.nucleon_form_factors: Valence quark counting for vector Z' (Eq. 15 paper); Hoferichter 2017 for scalar portal

table2_best_fits.note: Best-fit parameters from GCE morphological fit. m_Zp=120 GeV, g_chi=1.0, Dirac DM.

phase05_decisions.D1_quark_mass_scheme: MSbar at 2 GeV for form factors; pole masses for kinematic thresholds
phase05_decisions.D2_higgs_lambda_convention: (1/2)lambda|H|^2 S^2 — paper explicit; h-chi-chi vertex = lambda*v_h
phase05_decisions.D3_sigma_SI_FF: CASE_A: valence quark counting, f_p = g_Zp*(2*Q_V[u]+Q_V[d]), f_n = g_Zp*(Q_V[u]+2*Q_V[d]). For B-L: f_p=f_n=g_Zp. Tolerance 5%.
phase05_decisions.D4_N_nu: Lmu-Le/Le-Ltau/Lmu-Ltau: N_nu_active=2, N_nu_sterile=0. B-L: N_nu_active=3, N_nu_sterile=3.
phase05_decisions.D5_dirac_majorana: Dirac for all Z' portals; scalar for Higgs portal
phase05_decisions.D6_ufo: Plan C: no UFO vendored; generate_mg_tasks.py emits nothing; 10 Tier-3 tasks
